## Cursor Team Kit at a Glance

`Cursor Team Kit` is a workflow plugin for the full dev loop: **check code health → fix CI/build issues → review PRs → ship**.

### How you use it

- Run commands directly with `/`, e.g. `/check-compiler-errors`
- You can also invoke skills/subagents directly with `/...`
- In many cases, I can call these workflows automatically when relevant

### What’s included

- `check-compiler-errors` — runs compile/type-check and reports failures
- `deslop` — cleans up AI-ish code style / code slop
- `fix-ci` — finds failed CI jobs, inspects logs, applies focused fixes
- `fix-merge-conflicts` — resolves merge conflicts and validates build/tests
- `get-pr-comments` — fetches/summarizes PR review comments
- `loop-on-ci` — keeps watching CI and iterates until green
- `new-branch-and-pr` — creates branch, completes work, opens PR
- `pr-review-canvas` — generates an interactive HTML PR walkthrough from a GitHub PR URL
- `review-and-ship` — structured review + close key issues + ship via PR
- `run-smoke-tests` — runs Playwright smoke tests and debugs failures
- `weekly-review` — weekly summary of your authored commits
- `what-did-i-get-done` — time-scoped commit summary

### Subagent included

- `ci-watcher` — monitors GitHub CI for the current branch and reports pass/fail + failure logs (great to run while you keep coding)

### Rules applied automatically

- `no-inline-imports` — imports stay at the top of files
- `typescript-exhaustive-switch` — enforce exhaustive handling for TS unions/enums

---

If you want, I can walk you through a real workflow now (for example: `/check-compiler-errors` → `/fix-ci` → `/review-and-ship`).
